title: Functions should be called consistently with or without new
description: JavaScript has the new keyword that is used in conjunction with constructor functions to create new instances of objects. When you use the new keyword with a function, it signifies that the function is intended to be used as a constructor function to create objects. Any function can be used as a constructor function by convention.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Constructor function should start with uppercase letter. Consider renaming or calling without 'new'.
Capitalized function called without 'new'. If this is a constructor, use 'new' keyword.
Function is called both with and without 'new' keyword. Use consistently.
Function is called both with and without 'new' keyword. Use consistently.
